productDisplayName: Carlton London Men's Formal Brown Shoe
description: Perfect for those semi-formal occasions, this pair of slip-on leather shoes from carlton london is designed for the man who loves to experiment. Upper Paneled leather upper for maximum style, durability and comfort Slip-on system with elasticated wedges connecting tongue and sockliner for easy wear Reinforced heel cup overlay for maximum durability Midsole TPU midsole for durability and comfort Mildly cushioned footbed for protection Outsole TPU outsole for enhanced durability and comfort Textured outsole with dotted toe region and foreheel, and rangoli-patterned grooves in forefoot and back heel for maximum grip and traction Mildly curved outsole for ergonomic comfort Raised heel for style shoe careWipe surface using a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
